name: MasterKodi AI Subs
changelog: Multi-key rotation: add 'Extra Gemini keys' (comma-separated, from other free accounts). When a key's DAILY quota runs out, we now rotate to the next KEY on the SAME (best) model, and only drop to a weaker model once every key is exhausted on it. Bad keys are skipped. 3 keys = 3x best-model quota before any downgrade.
